penalties.detail: 46% of declaration weight has no edges

adjustment.reason_zh: isolated/resolution 惩罚主要源于 TypeScript 仅类型导入(type-only imports)无法被静态 uses 边解析:extensions/types.ts(107)、harness/types.ts(61)、ai/types.ts(43)、agent/types.ts(18)、oauth/types.ts(11) 等纯类型定义模块贡献约 240 个'孤立'声明,这些类型实际被广泛引用,属图谱失真而非真实死代码。
adjustment.reason_en: The isolated/resolution penalties are inflated by TypeScript type-only imports that static uses-edge extraction (74% resolved) cannot capture: pure type-definition modules (extensions/types.ts=107, harness/types.ts=61, ai/types.ts=43, agent/types.ts=18, oauth/types.ts=11) contribute ~240 'isolated' declarations that are in fact heavily referenced as types — graph distortion, not real dead code.

classes.description_zh: 终端 UI 的主控类,在 Container 之上实现差分渲染、焦点管理、输入分发、覆盖层栈与硬件光标定位,驱动整个界面的绘制循环。
classes.description_en: The top-level terminal UI class that extends Container to implement differential rendering, focus management, input dispatch, an overlay stack, and hardware-cursor positioning, driving the whole draw loop.

classes.name: UndoStack
classes.description_zh: 采用入栈即深拷贝语义的通用撤销栈,为输入框与编辑器组件保存可回退的状态快照。
classes.description_en: A generic undo stack with clone-on-push semantics that stores rollback-able state snapshots for the input and editor components.

classes.name: getGraphemeSegmenter
classes.signature: function getGraphemeSegmenter(): Intl.Segmenter

classes.name: getWordSegmenter
classes.signature: function getWordSegmenter(): Intl.Segmenter

classes.name: couldBeEmoji
classes.signature: function couldBeEmoji(segment: string): boolean

classes.name: isPrintableAscii
classes.signature: function isPrintableAscii(str: string): boolean

classes.name: truncateFragmentToWidth
classes.signature: function truncateFragmentToWidth(text: string, maxWidth: number): { text: string; width: number }

classes.name: finalizeTruncatedResult
classes.signature: function finalizeTruncatedResult( prefix: string, prefixWidth: number, ellipsis: string, ellipsisWidth: number, maxWidth: number, pad: boolean, ): string

classes.name: graphemeWidth
classes.signature: function graphemeWidth(segment: string): number

classes.name: visibleWidth
classes.signature: function visibleWidth(str: string): number
classes.description_zh: 计算字符串在终端中的可见列宽(剥离 ANSI/OSC/APC 转义、处理宽字符与字形簇并带缓存),是所有布局与对齐计算的基石。
classes.description_en: Computes a string's visible column width in the terminal (stripping ANSI/OSC/APC escapes, handling wide chars and grapheme clusters, with caching), the foundation of all layout and alignment math.

classes.name: normalizeTerminalOutput
classes.signature: function normalizeTerminalOutput(str: string): string

classes.name: extractAnsiCode
classes.signature: function extractAnsiCode(str: string, pos: number): { code: string; length: number } | null
classes.description_zh: 从指定位置识别并提取一个完整的 ANSI 转义序列(CSI 样式、OSC 超链接、APC 光标标记),是宽度计算与切片处理转义码的底层工具。
classes.description_en: Identifies and extracts one complete ANSI escape sequence (CSI styling, OSC hyperlinks, APC cursor markers) at a position, the low-level primitive width and slicing routines use to skip escape codes.

classes.name: parseOsc8Hyperlink
classes.signature: function parseOsc8Hyperlink(ansiCode: string): ActiveHyperlink | null | undefined

classes.name: formatOsc8Hyperlink
classes.signature: function formatOsc8Hyperlink(hyperlink: ActiveHyperlink): string

classes.name: formatOsc8Close
classes.signature: function formatOsc8Close(terminator: Osc8Terminator): string

classes.name: updateTrackerFromText
classes.signature: function updateTrackerFromText(text: string, tracker: AnsiCodeTracker): void

classes.name: splitIntoTokensWithAnsi
classes.signature: function splitIntoTokensWithAnsi(text: string): string[]

classes.name: wrapTextWithAnsi
classes.signature: function wrapTextWithAnsi(text: string, width: number): string[]
classes.description_zh: 在保留并跨行延续 ANSI 样式状态的前提下对文本做按词换行(不填充、不加背景),供 Text 类组件渲染多行内容。
classes.description_en: Word-wraps text while preserving and carrying ANSI styling state across line breaks (no padding, no background), used by Text-style components to render multi-line content.

classes.name: wrapSingleLine
classes.signature: function wrapSingleLine(line: string, width: number): string[]

classes.name: isWhitespaceChar
classes.signature: function isWhitespaceChar(char: string): boolean
classes.description_zh: 判断单个字符是否为空白字符,供分词导航、换行与编辑逻辑判定单词边界。
classes.description_en: Tests whether a single character is whitespace, used by word navigation, wrapping, and editing logic to detect word boundaries.

classes.name: isPunctuationChar
classes.signature: function isPunctuationChar(char: string): boolean

classes.name: breakLongWord
classes.signature: function breakLongWord(word: string, width: number, tracker: AnsiCodeTracker): string[]

classes.name: applyBackgroundToLine
classes.signature: function applyBackgroundToLine(line: string, width: number, bgFn: (text: string) => string): string
classes.description_zh: 把一行文本按指定宽度用空格右补齐后整体套用背景着色函数,用于绘制满宽的背景条(如选中行、Box)。
classes.description_en: Right-pads a line to a target width with spaces then applies a background color function over it, used to draw full-width background bands such as selected rows and Box backgrounds.

classes.name: truncateToWidth
classes.signature: function truncateToWidth( text: string, maxWidth: number, ellipsis: string = "...", pad: boolean = false, ): string
classes.description_zh: 将含 ANSI 码的文本截断到最大可见宽度并按需追加省略号或补齐到精确宽度,广泛用于列表项与列布局的单元格裁剪。
classes.description_en: Truncates ANSI-aware text to a maximum visible width, optionally appending an ellipsis or padding to exactly that width, used widely for clipping list items and column cells.

classes.name: sliceByColumn
classes.signature: function sliceByColumn(line: string, startCol: number, length: number, strict = false): string
classes.description_zh: 按可见列范围从一行中切出子串(正确处理 ANSI 码与宽字符),为水平滚动与视口裁剪提供按列取片能力。
classes.description_en: Slices a substring out of a line by visible-column range (correctly handling ANSI codes and wide chars), providing column-based extraction for horizontal scrolling and viewport clipping.

classes.name: sliceWithWidth
classes.signature: function sliceWithWidth( line: string, startCol: number, length: number, strict = false, ): { text: string; width: number }
classes.description_zh: 与 sliceByColumn 同义但同时返回结果的实际可见宽度,单遍扫描完成 ANSI 感知的按列切片。
classes.description_en: Like sliceByColumn but also returns the slice's actual visible width, performing the ANSI-aware column slice in a single pass.

classes.name: extractSegments
classes.signature: function extractSegments( line: string, beforeEnd: number, afterStart: number, afterLen: number, strictAfter = false, ): { before: string; beforeWidth: number; after: string; afterWidth: number }
classes.description_zh: 一次扫描中从一行里同时取出覆盖区域前后的两段内容并保留前段样式状态,供覆盖层合成时拼接 before/after 文本。
classes.description_en: Extracts the before- and after-region segments of a line in one pass while preserving the leading styling state, used to splice before/after text when compositing overlays.

classes.name: findWordBackward
classes.signature: function findWordBackward(text: string, cursor: number, options?: WordNavigationOptions): number
classes.description_zh: 纯函数计算向后移动一个单词后的光标位置(跳过尾随空白并在词/标点边界停下,可识别粘贴标记等原子段),供编辑器的按词导航与删除使用。
classes.description_en: A pure function computing the cursor position after moving one word backward (skipping trailing whitespace, stopping at word/punctuation boundaries, honoring atomic segments like paste markers) for the editor's word navigation and deletion.

classes.name: findWordForward
classes.signature: function findWordForward(text: string, cursor: number, options?: WordNavigationOptions): number
classes.description_zh: 纯函数计算向前移动一个单词后的光标位置(跳过前导空白并在词/标点边界停下,可识别原子段),与 findWordBackward 对称服务于编辑器按词操作。
classes.description_en: A pure function computing the cursor position after moving one word forward (skipping leading whitespace, stopping at word/punctuation boundaries, honoring atomic segments), the symmetric counterpart for the editor's word-wise operations.

classes.name: Box
classes.description_zh: 为其所有子组件统一施加内边距并套用满宽背景着色的容器组件,带渲染缓存以减少重绘开销。
classes.description_en: A container component that applies uniform padding and a full-width background color to all its children, with a render cache to avoid redundant repaints.

classes.name: isPasteMarker
classes.signature: function isPasteMarker(segment: string): boolean

classes.name: segmentWithMarkers
classes.signature: function segmentWithMarkers( text: string, baseSegmenter: Intl.Segmenter, validIds: Set<number>, ): Iterable<Intl.SegmentData>

classes.name: wordWrapLine
classes.signature: function wordWrapLine(line: string, maxWidth: number, preSegmented?: Intl.SegmentData[]): TextChunk[]
classes.description_zh: 把单行按词换行切成带原始位置信息的 TextChunk 块(词边界优先、超长词回退逐字符切),是多行编辑器视觉换行的核心。
classes.description_en: Splits a single line into word-wrapped TextChunks carrying original-position info (preferring word boundaries, falling back to per-character breaks for overlong words), the core of the multi-line editor's visual wrapping.

classes.name: escapeCharacterClass
classes.signature: function escapeCharacterClass(value: string): string

classes.name: buildTriggerPattern
classes.signature: function buildTriggerPattern(triggerCharacters: string[]): RegExp

classes.name: buildDebouncePattern
classes.signature: function buildDebouncePattern(triggerCharacters: string[]): RegExp

classes.name: Editor
classes.description_zh: 功能完整的多行可聚焦编辑器组件,集成视觉换行、键位绑定、kill-ring/撤销、按词导航、粘贴标记与自动补全弹层,是 CLI 的主输入控件。
classes.description_en: The full-featured multi-line focusable editor component integrating visual wrapping, keybindings, kill-ring/undo, word navigation, paste markers, and the autocomplete popup, the CLI's primary input control.

classes.name: Input
classes.description_zh: 单行可聚焦文本输入组件,带水平滚动、括号粘贴缓冲、kill-ring 与撤销,提供提交/取消回调,用于简单的一行输入场景。
classes.description_en: A single-line focusable text input component with horizontal scrolling, bracketed-paste buffering, kill-ring, and undo, exposing submit/cancel callbacks for simple one-line input.

classes.name: Loader
classes.description_zh: 在 Text 之上扩展的加载指示组件,以可配置帧动画的旋转图标加消息呈现进行中状态并按间隔触发重绘。
classes.description_en: A loading-indicator component extending Text that shows progress with a configurable spinner-frame animation plus a message, scheduling repaints on an interval.

classes.name: SelectList
classes.description_zh: 可过滤、可滚动的选择列表组件,以双列(标签+描述)布局渲染候选并支持键盘选择,是自动补全与命令选择弹层的展示载体。
classes.description_en: A filterable, scrollable selection-list component rendering candidates in a two-column (label + description) layout with keyboard selection, the display surface for autocomplete and command-pick popups.

classes.name: Text
classes.description_zh: 最基础的文本组件,带内边距与可选背景、按宽度做 ANSI 感知的自动换行并缓存渲染结果,是多数静态内容的展示单元。
classes.description_en: The most basic text component with padding and optional background, performing ANSI-aware word wrapping to width and caching its render, the display unit for most static content.

layer_groups.name: Foundation Libraries
layer_groups.summary_zh: 底层基础库:多供应商 LLM API 与终端 UI 渲染引擎(互不依赖的并列模块)
layer_groups.summary_en: Foundational libraries: the multi-provider LLM API and the terminal-UI rendering engine — independent peers

flows.description_zh: main() 解析命令行参数、装配会话运行时与服务、创建 AgentSession,最终启动交互模式 UI。
flows.description_en: main() parses CLI args, assembles the session runtime and services, builds the AgentSession, then launches the interactive-mode UI.

steps.label_zh: 解析 argv,推断运行模式
装配服务并求解会话选项
按模式启动 UI(交互/打印/RPC)

flows.name_zh: Agent 回合:输入到工具执行
flows.name_en: Agent turn: input to tool execution
flows.description_zh: 用户输入经 AgentSession 进入 AgentHarness,驱动 runAgentLoop/runLoop 流式请求 LLM,解析工具调用并执行,结果回灌循环。
flows.description_en: User input flows through AgentSession into the AgentHarness, driving runAgentLoop/runLoop to stream the LLM, parse tool calls, execute them, and feed results back into the loop.

steps.label_zh: 每回合请求一次助手响应
steps.label_en: Request an assistant response per turn

steps.label_zh: 归一化事件流(增量直到 done)
若有 toolCall 则执行(并行/串行)
返回工具结果并回灌上下文
steps.label_en: Return tool results, feed back into context

steps.label_zh: 循环至无更多工具调用或满足停止条件
steps.label_en: Loop until no more tool calls or stop condition

flows.name_zh: 统一 LLM 流式请求
flows.description_zh: stream() 按 model.api 从注册表选取 provider 适配器,注入环境 API key,适配器构建请求、调用 SDK 客户端并把厂商事件归一化为统一事件流。
flows.description_en: stream() picks a provider adapter from the registry by model.api, injects the env API key, and the adapter builds the request, calls the SDK client, and normalizes vendor events into a unified event stream.

steps.label_zh: 按 model.api 解析提供方

flows.description_zh: edit 工具校验输入、去 BOM 与换行归一化,计算并应用差异,生成统一补丁与 diff 字符串,最后渲染差异组件。
flows.description_en: The edit tool validates input, strips BOM and normalizes line endings, computes and applies the diff, generates a unified patch and diff string, then renders the diff component.

extra_nodes.name: 目标文件 / Target file
extra_nodes.description_zh: 磁盘上被读取与写回的源文件。
extra_nodes.description_en: The on-disk source file read in and written back.

extra_nodes.name: 统一补丁 / Unified patch
extra_nodes.description_zh: 返回给模型作为工具结果的 diff 补丁。
extra_nodes.description_en: The diff patch returned to the model as the tool result.

links.label_zh: 补丁与 diff 字符串

flows.description_zh: shouldCompact 判定后,prepareCompaction 估算 token 并求切点,compact 调 LLM 生成摘要并合并文件操作,分支退出时再生成分支摘要。
flows.description_en: After shouldCompact gates, prepareCompaction estimates tokens and finds a cut point, compact calls the LLM to summarize and merges file operations, and a branch summary is generated on branch exit.

extra_nodes.name: 摘要 LLM / Summarizer LLM
extra_nodes.description_zh: 被调用以将历史压缩为结构化摘要的模型。
extra_nodes.description_en: The model invoked to condense history into a structured summary.

extra_nodes.name: 压缩条目 / Compaction entry
extra_nodes.description_zh: 写回会话树、记录摘要与首个保留条目的压缩条目。
extra_nodes.description_en: The compaction entry written back to the session tree with the summary and first-kept-entry id.

links.label_zh: 分支切换时复用准备逻辑

flows.description_zh: Session 经仓库(JSONL 或内存)创建,追加条目时分配 UUIDv7 并写入存储,getEntries/getBranch 取出路径条目后由 buildSessionContext 重建上下文。
flows.description_en: A Session is created via a repo (JSONL or in-memory); appending entries assigns a UUIDv7 and writes to storage, while getEntries/getBranch yield path entries that buildSessionContext replays into a context.

steps.label_en: toSession wraps storage into a Session

steps.label_zh: JSONL 追加一行(或内存数组)
steps.label_en: Append one JSONL line (or in-memory array)

steps.label_zh: getBranch / getEntries 读取路径条目
返回根到叶的条目序列

flows.description_zh: TUI 渲染循环递归布局 Container/Component 得到新帧,合成浮层后与上一帧逐行比较,只写最小变更的 ANSI 到 ProcessTerminal,并处理 kitty 图像。
flows.description_en: The TUI render loop recursively lays out Container/Component into a new frame, composites overlays, diffs it line-by-line against the previous frame, and writes only the minimal changed ANSI to ProcessTerminal, handling kitty images.

extra_nodes.name: 上一帧 / Previous frame
extra_nodes.description_zh: 缓存的上一帧行数组,用于逐行比较找出首/末变更行。
extra_nodes.description_en: Cached previous line array used to find the first/last changed lines.

extra_nodes.name: 终端 / Terminal device
extra_nodes.description_zh: 接收最小 ANSI 写入并显示的真实终端。
extra_nodes.description_en: The real terminal that receives the minimal ANSI writes and displays them.

links.label_zh: 失效行携带的图像 id

flows.description_zh: DefaultResourceLoader 经包管理器收集资源条目,加载扩展并建扩展运行时,再加载技能、提示模板与项目上下文文件,标注来源后注册进会话。
flows.description_en: DefaultResourceLoader collects resource entries via the package manager, loads extensions and builds the extension runtime, then loads skills, prompt templates and project context files, tags their source, and registers them into the session.

stages.name_zh: 加载上下文并标注来源

extra_nodes.name: 资源目录 / Resource dirs
extra_nodes.description_zh: 用户/项目/包内的扩展、技能、模板与上下文文件目录。
extra_nodes.description_en: User/project/package directories of extensions, skills, templates and context files.

extra_nodes.name: AgentSession
extra_nodes.description_zh: 接收已加载资源并注册工具/命令的会话。
extra_nodes.description_en: The session that receives the loaded resources and registers tools/commands.
